articles.title: Tesla Beats China’s EV Market in New Efficiency Test
articles.description:
Tesla continues to extend its efficiency lead in China. The Model 3 and Model Y once again ranked as the two most efficient vehicles in a new real-world energy consumption test conducted by Chinese automotive publication Autohome, which placed dozens of EVs under identical, controlled conditions to evaluate their true high-speed consumption (via Sina News). Autohome […]

The post Tesla Beats China’s EV Market in New Efficiency Test appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.
articles.author: Nehal Malik

articles.title: Tesla Snags Apple AI Engineer for Optimus Robot Push
articles.description:
Tesla has quietly pulled in another major AI hire — this time straight out of Apple’s ranks. In social media posts over the weekend, former Apple engineer Yilun Chen announced he has officially joined Tesla’s Optimus AI team, capping off nearly four years at the Cupertino giant working across hardware, engineering, research, and early-stage product […]

The post Tesla Snags Apple AI Engineer for Optimus Robot Push appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.
articles.author: Nehal Malik

articles.title: Tesla Cybertruck Drives 1,200 Miles on FSD With Zero Interventions
articles.description:
A Tesla Cybertruck owner is turning heads across the EV community after sharing proof that his truck drove more than 1,200 miles entirely on its own using Full Self-Driving (Supervised). The owner, who goes by @brunitatoiu on X, posted screenshots from Tesla’s new Self-Driving Stats interface — introduced with FSD v14.2 — showing 1,285.8 out […]

The post Tesla Cybertruck Drives 1,200 Miles on FSD With Zero Interventions appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.
articles.author: Nehal Malik

articles.title: Tesla’s new Holiday perk is timed perfectly to make FSD a household name
articles.description:
Tesla AI4 owners get FSD (Supervised) through Christmas, New Year’s Eve and well into the post-holiday travel season.

The post Tesla’s new Holiday perk is timed perfectly to make FSD a household name appeared first on TESLARATI.
articles.author: Simon Alvarez

articles.title: Elon Musk predicts AI and robotics could make work “optional” within 20 years
articles.description:
Speaking on entrepreneur Nikhil Kamath’s podcast, Musk predicted that machines will soon handle most forms of labor, leaving humans to work only if they choose to.

The post Elon Musk predicts AI and robotics could make work “optional” within 20 years appeared first on TESLARATI.
articles.author: Simon Alvarez

articles.title: Elon Musk reiterates why Tesla will never make an electric motorcycle
articles.description:
Tesla CEO Elon Musk preemptively shut down speculations about a Tesla road bike once more.

The post Elon Musk reiterates why Tesla will never make an electric motorcycle appeared first on TESLARATI.
articles.author: Simon Alvarez

articles.title: Tesla continues growing its Cybercab production team with new job listings
articles.description:
Both positions are based in Gigafactory Texas, the site of the Cybercab’s initial production.

The post Tesla continues growing its Cybercab production team with new job listings appeared first on TESLARATI.

articles.title: Tesla starts laying the groundwork for FSD tests in Austria
articles.description:
The job opening comes as the company pushes regulatory approvals and data collection in new European markets.

The post Tesla starts laying the groundwork for FSD tests in Austria appeared first on TESLARATI.

articles.title: Tesla Semi factory looks almost complete during Thanksgiving weekend
articles.description:
Based on recent drone videos, the Tesla Semi factory looks practically ready to start operations.

The post Tesla Semi factory looks almost complete during Thanksgiving weekend appeared first on TESLARATI.
articles.author: Simon Alvarez

articles.title: Tesla scores major hire as Apple scientist moves to Optimus team
articles.description:
Chen, who advanced from individual contributor to technical lead during his time at Apple, noted that he was blown away by Tesla’s efforts and synergy.

The post Tesla scores major hire as Apple scientist moves to Optimus team appeared first on TESLARATI.
articles.author: Simon Alvarez

articles.title: Elon Musk gives nod to SpaceX’s massive, previously impossible feat
articles.description:
It was the booster’s 30th flight, a scenario that seemed impossible before SpaceX became a dominant force in spaceflight. 

The post Elon Musk gives nod to SpaceX’s massive, previously impossible feat appeared first on TESLARATI.

articles.title: Tesla AI and Autopilot VP hints that Robovan will have RV conversions
articles.description:
Tesla’s vice president of AI and Autopilot software, Ashok Elluswamy, hinted at the linitiative in a reply to Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan.

The post Tesla AI and Autopilot VP hints that Robovan will have RV conversions appeared first on TESLARATI.
articles.author: Simon Alvarez

articles.title: Tesla tinkering with Speed Profiles on FSD v14.2.1 has gone too far
articles.description:
Tesla recently released Full Self-Driving (FSD) v14.2.1, its latest version, but the tinkering with Speed Profiles has perhaps gone too far. We try to keep it as real as possible with Full Self-Driving operation, and we are well aware that with the new versions, some things get better, but others get worse. It is all […]

The post Tesla tinkering with Speed Profiles on FSD v14.2.1 has gone too far appeared first on TESLARATI.
articles.author: Joey Klender

FSD 14.2.1 definitely feels a bit neutered, even on mad max mode. It is much more cautious about making lane changes, waiting even if someone is quite a distance away.

posts.text:
@basedtechexec Very appreciative of that! We get it, but we also realize there’s no real advantage to acting like it has zero things that need fixed. 

When Tesla actually does solve self-driving, it won’t be as sweet if we act like it’s perfect now.
